search_queries: 7520 rate January 2026 estate gift tax valuation
contract_notes: Report the IRC §7520 interest rate for January 2026 as a percentage (e.g. 4.6 means 4.6%).
The §7520 rate equals 120% of the mid-term AFR (annual compounding), rounded to the nearest two-tenths of one percent (0.2%).
Source is the IRS §7520 interest rates page or the monthly Revenue Ruling in the Internal Revenue Bulletin.
This rate is used for valuing annuities, life estates, remainders, and reversions under IRC §7520 for estate, gift, and income tax purposes.
